message.content:
@startuml
class Player
class Piece
class King
class Queen
class Bishop
class Knight
class Rook
class Pawn

Player o-- "16" Piece

Piece <|-- King

Piece <|-- "2" Knight

Piece <|-- "8" Pawn

Player --> King
Player --> Queen
Player --> Bishop
Player --> Knight
Player --> Rook
Player --> Pawn
@enduml
